content: Hey, I'm Finley. I'm a financial analyst at Goldman Sachs, and I love my job, but I'm also really into 3D printing and home brewing beer.
That's a great combination, Finley! 3D printing and home brewing are both so creative and fun. What do you like about 3D printing?
I love the ability to create something from scratch, it's so satisfying. I also enjoy mountain biking, it's a great way to get some exercise and enjoy the outdoors.
Mountain biking sounds like a great hobby, Finley. Do you have a favorite trail or spot to ride?
I love riding in the mountains near Salt Lake City, the scenery is so beautiful. I also enjoy surfing, it's a great way to relax and challenge myself.
Surfing is a great hobby, Finley. What do you like about it?
I love the feeling of being out on the water, it's so peaceful. I've been reading a lot of sci-fi novels lately, they're so thought-provoking and fun.
Sci-fi is a great genre, Finley. What's your favorite book or series?
I love the Dune series, it's so complex and detailed. I've been renovating my house in Salt Lake City, it's been a big project but it's worth it.
Renovating a house can be a challenge, Finley. What's been the most difficult part of the process?
I think the hardest part has been finding the time and resources to get everything done, but it's coming along. I've been working on it for about 6 months now.
That's a big undertaking, Finley. But it'll be worth it in the end, I'm sure. Do you have any fun plans for the upcoming summer?

I'm thinking of taking a trip to California, maybe to visit some of the national parks and do some surfing. I've also been thinking about starting a new 3D printing project, maybe something for my house.
That sounds like a great idea, Finley! You could make some really cool decorations or functional items for your home. What kind of 3D printing technology do you use?
I use a FDM printer, it's been working great for me. I've been experimenting with different materials and designs, it's a lot of fun.
FDM is a great technology, Finley. I've heard it's really versatile and easy to use. Do you have any favorite online communities or forums for 3D printing and home brewing?

Yeah, I love the Reddit communities for 3D printing and home brewing, they're so helpful and supportive. I've learned a lot from the other users and it's great to share my own knowledge and experiences.
That's great, Finley! Online communities can be so valuable for learning and connecting with others who share similar interests.
